original_prompt: Expand the Appointments module with filters, column updates, and reschedule actions in view.appointments.js. Enhance view.appointment_detail.js with technician name, time windows, increased map height, and a back button. Ensure status lifecycle support (None, Scheduled, Rescheduled, Completed).
rephrased_goal: Modernize the Appointment management suite by adding operational filters (Date, Status, City, Tech), clarifying data columns, implementing a rescheduling workflow, and improving the detail view with better visibility and navigation.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Extract and Analyze Existing View Files
subtasks_required: 1.3 Identify insertion points for filter bar and headers
tasks.analogy_reference: looking at old cave walls to see where paint new hunt
tasks.testing_criteria: Lines for filters and headers correctly identified.

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Verify context and insertion points
subtasks_required: 2.1 Verify if filter-bar is already present
2.2 Check if status logic matches requested lifecycle
tasks.analogy_reference: poking wall to see if dry

subtasks_required: 3.1 Add Filter Bar HTML (Date, Status, City, Tech ID) to stringComponent
3.3 Update render logic to handle filtering states
3.4 Add 'Reschedule' button icon to action column
tasks.analogy_reference: adding new traps (filters) to the path
tasks.testing_criteria: Filter bar visible, header changed, action button visible.

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Verify Table UI and Filters
tasks.analogy_reference: checking if traps move when wind blow
tasks.testing_criteria: Selectors for filters are correctly onboarded and listeners attached.

subtasks_required: 5.1 Add 'Back to Appointments' button to header
5.2 Resolve and display Technician Name for tech_id
5.4 Update map height in CSS/In-component style
5.5 Update AppointmentDetailView to handle new status lifecycle
tasks.analogy_reference: making the detail hunt wall clearer
tasks.testing_criteria: Back button works, name visible, time calculated, map larger.

tasks.analogy_reference: checking if sun and moon line up (times)

subtasks_required: 7.1 Create Reschedule Modal logic in view.appointments.js
tasks.analogy_reference: changing hunt date on shared rock
tasks.testing_criteria: Modal opens, updates db, logs action.
